name: Chickpea & Herb Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain chickpeas and rinse well.
2. Cut cucumber into thin slices, then halve them.
3. Cut tomato into wedges, then halve them.
4. Put cucumbers and tomato pieces, as well as red peppers and scallions, in a bowl. Set aside.
5. Dice avocado.
6. Add diced avocado to a large bowl.
7. Add oil and juice from half the lemon.
8. Add salt, pepper, and basil. Stir with a fork (avocado will cream).
9. Add the vegetables and dill to the avocado mixture.
10. Toss gently.
11. Add chickpeas and combine.
12. Taste and add more lemon, salt, and pepper as needed.
13. Serve. Can be prepared ahead of time and refrigerated.
